description: Style Notetonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a sweetheart neckline, this black and white dress has thin adjustable straps, is padded at the bust area, straight back, broad band at the empire waist with a sash at the back and a puffed hemMaterial and Care92% polyester and 8% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
